token_analysis.distribution_similarity: Cosine similarity on token-type frequencies (excluding whitespace/comments)

metrics.complexity: Approx cyclomatic indicators via decision-point token counts
metrics.body_preservation: Per function/method body token counts aligned by fully-qualified name (excludes procedural files with no functions)
metrics.signature_stability: Parameter count and modifier preservation (excludes procedural files with no functions)

similarity.sequence: SequenceMatcher ratio on normalized token stream

notes: Coverage requires a runnable project + test suite; this script reports body preservation as a proxy when tests are unavailable.
All failures are recorded per-file in an 'errors' field; no silent fallbacks.
